title: Guinean miner to lower the long-term contract price
section_path: Guinean miner to lower the long-term contract price
section_path_text: Guinean miner to lower the long-term contract price
summary:
Main
Image reference: assets/2026-02-12_guinean-miner-to-lower-the-long-term-contract-price_img_rgb-color-brs-shipbrokers-monogram-l_c365f35f1de5.png
On January 29, a major Guinean miner reportedly lowered its 1Q26 bauxite long-term contract price from $66/mt to $62/mt. Notably, this round of long-term price adjustment occurred before the end of January, which is unusual. Unlike short-term spot fluctuations, the relaxation of long-term contract prices signals a systemic reassessment of first quarter fundamentals by both participants on the supply and demand sides.
